add-ons.name: Obsidian Vault
add-ons.description: Connect your Obsidian vault to Crow for reading, searching, and syncing notes
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH
env_vars.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault directory

add-ons.name: Home Assistant
add-ons.description: Control your smart home through Home Assistant — lights, temperature, switches, and more
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: Ollama (Local AI)
add-ons.description: Run local AI models for embeddings, summarization, and content classification
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: RAM and disk depend on model size. Small models need ~2GB, large models need 8GB+.

add-ons.name: LocalAI
add-ons.description: OpenAI-compatible local AI server — chat, embeddings, and TTS without a cloud API
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: OpenAI-compatible API. Set AI_PROVIDER=openai and AI_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080/v1 to use with Crow AI Chat.

add-ons.name: Nextcloud
add-ons.description: Access Nextcloud files via WebDAV mount — sync documents, browse folders
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: Immich Photos
add-ons.description: Search photos, browse albums, and manage your Immich photo library
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: IMMICH_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Immich API key (from Immich admin panel)

add-ons.notes: Connects to an existing Immich instance. Limited ARM64 support.

add-ons.name: File Storage (MinIO)
add-ons.description: S3-compatible file storage — upload, organize, and share files through Crow
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD
env_vars.description: MinIO admin password (choose a strong password)

add-ons.notes: After installation, Crow's storage tools (upload, list, delete files) are available automatically. MinIO console at http://localhost:9001.

add-ons.name: Media Hub
add-ons.description: News aggregation, RSS feeds, YouTube channels, podcasts, TTS audio, briefings, playlists, smart folders, email digests
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: 16 MCP tools for news and media management. No external services required. AI analysis uses your configured AI provider. TTS requires edge-tts (npm install edge-tts). Email digests require SMTP + nodemailer.

add-ons.name: Podcasts
add-ons.description: Subscribe to and play podcasts, plus publish your own podcast episodes as blog posts with iTunes-compatible RSS
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Includes both a podcast player (subscribe and listen) and a podcast publisher (create episodes as blog posts). Tables are self-initialized on first use.

add-ons.name: CrowClaw
add-ons.description: Create, configure, deploy, and monitor OpenClaw bots through MCP tools
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: RoMM
add-ons.description: Retro game library and emulator — browse, organize, and play retro games in the browser
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: ROMM_LIBRARY_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path containing your ROM files (organized by system)

env_vars.name: ROMM_AUTH_SECRET_KEY
env_vars.description: Session secret key for RoMM authentication

add-ons.notes: Organize ROMs into system subdirectories (gba/, snes/, n64/, etc.). IGDB credentials (free) enable automatic cover art and metadata.

add-ons.name: Tailscale
add-ons.description: Private network access — reach Crow from any device on your Tailnet
add-ons.author: Crow

add-ons.name: Songbook
add-ons.description: Personal chord book — ChordPro charts, transposition, chord diagrams, setlists, audio, and peer sharing
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Songs are blog posts tagged 'songbook' with ChordPro content. Installs a Songbook panel and AI skill.

add-ons.name: Tax Filing Assistant
add-ons.description: Prepare federal income taxes — document collection, calculation, PDF generation, and guided filing
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: CROW_TAX_ENCRYPTION_KEY
env_vars.description: Passphrase for encrypting PII at rest

add-ons.notes: Federal returns only — no state. 17 MCP tools including document ingestion (PDF reader). 2024 + 2025 tax years. Generates filled IRS PDFs. PII encrypted at rest. Not a substitute for professional tax advice.

add-ons.name: Data Dashboard
add-ons.description: Explore SQLite databases, run queries, build charts, create case studies, and publish to your blog
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: 10 MCP tools for data exploration. Includes SQL editor, schema explorer, and case study publishing. Works with any SQLite database registered as a project backend.

add-ons.name: Nominatim GIS
add-ons.description: Self-hosted geocoding and GIS — forward/reverse geocode, batch geocode data columns, generate GeoJSON, map visualizations
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Requires ~30GB disk (US extract) and 4GB+ RAM. Initial import takes hours. Depends on Data Dashboard for full integration.

add-ons.name: Browser Automation
add-ons.description: Stealth browser automation — navigate, fill forms, take screenshots, extract content via Chrome DevTools Protocol with VNC viewing
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: 11 MCP tools for browser automation. Runs headless Chrome in Docker with Xvfb + VNC. Human-like typing and clicking for stealth. CDP and VNC bind to localhost only — access via SSH tunnel from other machines.

add-ons.name: Jellyfin
add-ons.description: Self-hosted media server — stream movies, TV shows, and music with AI-powered library management
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: JELLYFIN_MEDIA_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for media files (Docker mode)

add-ons.notes: Self-host via Docker (set JELLYFIN_MEDIA_PATH) or connect to existing (set JELLYFIN_URL + JELLYFIN_API_KEY). 7 MCP tools for library search, browsing, and playback control.

add-ons.name: Plex
add-ons.description: Connect your Plex Media Server — browse library, control playback, manage playlists via AI
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Connects to existing Plex instance. Get token from browser dev tools on app.plex.tv. Some features require Plex Pass.

add-ons.name: IPTV
add-ons.description: IPTV channel management — M3U playlists, EPG program guide, channel groups, and favorites
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Lightweight IPTV manager — no Docker required. Add M3U playlists via AI or the panel. EPG data parsed from XMLTV sources.

add-ons.name: Kodi
add-ons.description: Remote control for Kodi — browse library, control playback, queue media via JSON-RPC
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Connects to existing Kodi instance. Enable HTTP remote control in Kodi Settings > Services > Web server.

add-ons.name: TriliumNext
add-ons.description: Personal knowledge base — search notes, manage note trees, clip web content, AI-powered organization via ETAPI
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: TRILIUM_DATA_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for TriliumNext data (Docker mode)

add-ons.notes: Self-host via Docker or connect to existing. Get ETAPI token from Options > ETAPI in TriliumNext. 11 MCP tools for note management.

add-ons.name: Knowledge Base
add-ons.description: Multilingual knowledge base — create, manage, and share organized collections of guides and articles with structured resource tracking, verification workflows, and LAN discovery
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: General-purpose knowledge base with multilingual support, LAN discovery (mDNS), WCAG 2.1 AA-compliant public pages, and AI-assisted content verification. No Docker required. 10 MCP tools.

add-ons.name: AI Companion
add-ons.description: Voice-interactive AI companion with animated Live2D avatar, powered by Open-LLM-VTuber with Crow BYOAI
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: COMPANION_PERSONA
env_vars.default: You are Crow, an AI companion. Helpful, curious, dry wit. Keep responses concise for speech.

add-ons.notes: Uses Crow AI Profiles for LLM inference. Voice recognition runs locally. TTS uses Edge TTS (free). Requires Tailscale HTTPS for microphone access.

add-ons.name: TURN Server (coturn)
add-ons.description: Self-hosted TURN relay for WebRTC voice chat. Enables NAT traversal for remote companion access when STUN alone is not sufficient.
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: TURN_SECRET
env_vars.description: Shared secret for generating time-limited TURN credentials

env_vars.name: TURN_EXTERNAL_IP
env_vars.description: Public IP of this machine (required for remote access, leave empty for LAN-only)

add-ons.notes: Optional for Tailscale-only deployments (STUN is sufficient). Required when users connect from restrictive networks. The companion gateway generates time-limited credentials via /api/turn-credentials.

add-ons.name: SDXL Background Generator
add-ons.description: AI-generated backgrounds for the companion avatar using SDXL Turbo. Requires NVIDIA GPU.
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Requires nvidia-container-toolkit. Models (~25GB) download on first start. Used by companion and storage server's crow_generate_background tool.

add-ons.name: Push Notifications (ntfy)
add-ons.description: Self-hosted push notifications via ntfy. Instant delivery to any device with the ntfy app.
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: NTFY_TOPIC
env_vars.description: Notification topic name (unique to your instance)

env_vars.name: NTFY_AUTH_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Access token for private topics (leave empty for open topics on local network)

add-ons.notes: Install the ntfy app on your phone (Android/iOS) and subscribe to your topic for instant push notifications. Works over Tailscale.

add-ons.name: Video & Audio Calls
add-ons.description: Peer-to-peer video and audio calling between Crow users. Start voice or video calls from the Nest panel or share direct room links. When the companion bundle is also installed, adds AI avatar modes and face tracking.
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: CROW_CALLS_ENABLED
env_vars.description: Enable calls signaling endpoint in gateway

add-ons.notes: No Docker container required. Adds gateway WebSocket signaling, static scripts, a Nest panel, and a skill file. Gateway restart required after install.

add-ons.name: Calibre Server
add-ons.description: OPDS content server for ebooks — search, browse, and download from your Calibre library
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: CALIBRE_LIBRARY_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path to Calibre library directory

env_vars.name: CALIBRE_USERNAME
env_vars.description: HTTP Basic auth username (if auth enabled)

add-ons.notes: Exposes Calibre's content server (OPDS + JSON API). Point CALIBRE_LIBRARY_PATH at your existing Calibre library. 6 MCP tools.

add-ons.name: Calibre-Web
add-ons.description: Web-based ebook reader and library manager for Calibre
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: CALIBRE_WEB_DB_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path to Calibre metadata.db directory

add-ons.notes: Web-based reader with shelves and reading progress. Point CALIBRE_WEB_DB_PATH at your Calibre library containing metadata.db. 7 MCP tools.

add-ons.name: Miniflux
add-ons.description: Minimalist RSS reader — subscribe to feeds, read articles, and track news
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Docker stack includes PostgreSQL. Port remapped from 8080 to 8085. 7 MCP tools for feed management and article reading.

add-ons.name: Audiobookshelf
add-ons.description: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server — search, browse, and track listening progress
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: AUDIOBOOKSHELF_AUDIOBOOK_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for audiobook files (Docker mode)

env_vars.name: AUDIOBOOKSHELF_PODCAST_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for podcast files (Docker mode)

add-ons.notes: Self-host via Docker or connect to existing instance. 7 MCP tools for library browsing and listening progress.

add-ons.name: Kavita
add-ons.description: Self-hosted manga, comics, and ebook reader — browse series, track reading progress
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: KAVITA_LIBRARY_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for manga/comic/ebook files (Docker mode)

add-ons.notes: Port 5000 is commonly used. JWT auth with auto-login. 7 MCP tools for library browsing and reading progress.

add-ons.name: Navidrome
add-ons.description: Lightweight music streaming server — browse albums, artists, playlists, and stream music
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: NAVIDROME_MUSIC_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for music files (Docker mode)

add-ons.notes: Uses Subsonic API for compatibility. Mount your music directory via NAVIDROME_MUSIC_PATH. 7 MCP tools.

add-ons.name: Paperless-ngx
add-ons.description: Document management with OCR — scan, search, tag, and organize paper documents digitally
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: PAPERLESS_API_TOKEN
env_vars.description: API token (Administration > Users > Edit > Auth Tokens)

env_vars.name: PAPERLESS_DATA_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path for data directory (Docker mode)

add-ons.notes: Docker stack includes PostgreSQL + Redis. Full-text OCR search. 8 MCP tools for document management.

add-ons.name: Wallabag
add-ons.description: Self-hosted read-it-later — save articles, read offline, and organize with tags
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: WALLABAG_CLIENT_ID
env_vars.description: OAuth2 client ID (API Clients Management in Wallabag)

add-ons.notes: Docker stack includes MariaDB + Redis. OAuth2 auth requires creating an API client in Wallabag settings first. Port remapped from 80 to 8084. 6 MCP tools.

add-ons.name: Linkding
add-ons.description: Lightweight bookmark manager — save, tag, search, and organize web links
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Lightweight single-container bookmark manager. 6 MCP tools.

add-ons.name: Shiori
add-ons.description: Simple bookmark manager — save web pages with cached content for offline reading
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Caches full page content for offline reading. Port remapped from 8080 to 8086. Session-based auth. 6 MCP tools.

add-ons.name: BookStack
add-ons.description: Self-hosted wiki platform — organize knowledge in shelves, books, chapters, and pages
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Docker stack includes MariaDB. Port remapped from 80 to 6875. Composite token auth (ID:SECRET). 8 MCP tools.

add-ons.name: Caddy Reverse Proxy
add-ons.description: Reverse proxy with automatic HTTPS via Let's Encrypt (ACME). Foundation for publicly exposed or federated bundles.
add-ons.author: Crow

install_consent_messages.en: Caddy binds ports 80 and 443 on all interfaces (0.0.0.0) so it can answer HTTP/HTTPS requests from the public internet and complete Let's Encrypt ACME challenges. Make sure ports 80 and 443 are open on your firewall/router and that no other service on this host is already listening on them. Caddy will automatically request and renew TLS certificates for any domain you configure; the domain's A/AAAA record must point to this host first.
install_consent_messages.es: Caddy se vincula a los puertos 80 y 443 en todas las interfaces (0.0.0.0) para responder a peticiones HTTP/HTTPS desde internet y completar los desafíos ACME de Let's Encrypt. Asegúrate de que los puertos 80 y 443 estén abiertos en tu firewall/router y que ningún otro servicio de este host los esté usando. Caddy solicitará y renovará certificados TLS automáticamente para cada dominio que configures; el registro A/AAAA del dominio debe apuntar primero a este host.

env_vars.name: CADDY_EMAIL
env_vars.description: Email for Let's Encrypt ACME account registration

add-ons.notes: Binds 80/443 on 0.0.0.0 (required for ACME). Admin API bound to 127.0.0.1:2019. Caddyfile at ~/.crow/caddy/Caddyfile. 5 MCP tools: status, reload, list_sites, add_site, remove_site.

add-ons.name: Uptime Kuma
add-ons.description: Service monitoring and uptime tracking with response-time graphs and status pages
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Listens on 3001 inside container, published on 127.0.0.1:3007. First-run: create admin user in web UI, then set UPTIMEKUMA_USERNAME/PASSWORD for /metrics parsing. 2 MCP tools (socket.io API is not wrapped).

add-ons.name: Stirling PDF
add-ons.description: Local PDF manipulation toolbox — merge, split, OCR, convert, compress, and 50+ other operations in-browser
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: No REST API — all operations run client-side in the browser. Panel embeds the web UI; MCP server has 2 tools (status + web URL). Stirling 2.x ships with a login form; create the admin on first visit. Bound to 127.0.0.1 only.

add-ons.name: Vikunja
add-ons.description: Self-hosted task management — projects, kanban boards, due dates, labels, and team collaboration
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Uses built-in SQLite. Single container. 8 MCP tools for task and project management.

add-ons.name: Actual Budget
add-ons.description: Privacy-first personal finance — track spending, manage budgets, and view financial reports
add-ons.author: Crow

env_vars.name: ACTUAL_SYNC_ID
env_vars.description: Budget sync ID to auto-select budget

add-ons.notes: Privacy-first budgeting. Data stays local. Password-based auth. 7 MCP tools for accounts, transactions, budgets, and reports.

add-ons.name: Developer Kit
add-ons.description: Build and submit Crow extensions with guided scaffolding, testing, and registry submission
add-ons.author: Crow
add-ons.notes: Skill-only. Guides AI through building and submitting Crow extensions.
